improvements.recommendation: Review reasoning engine confidence thresholds — increase minimum confidence before acting.
Mission planning needs better scope decomposition — subtasks are too large or ambiguous.
Increase pre-deployment validation coverage and add automated smoke tests.
Agent execution reliability is below threshold — review tool execution layer for failures.
